description_long: This is a single-story detached house surrounded by a wooden fence and set within a grassy yard. The house features a complex roof structure with intersecting gable and hip elements, covered in brown and reddish tiles. The front includes a covered porch supported by columns, a main entry door, and a driveway with a carport. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with a mix of rectangular and square shapes, and there is a wooden deck or veranda at the rear. The property includes outdoor furnishings such as benches and a small gate at the front. The overall design suggests a blend of modern and Craftsman architectural influences, with practical outdoor spaces and a focus on comfort.
description: A single-story house with a complex gable and hip roof, surrounded by a wooden fence and grassy yard, featuring a covered porch, carport, and asymmetrical windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry porch, carport, driveway, and front gate with a person standing in the yard.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the wooden deck/veranda, asymmetrical window placement, and the expanse of the fenced yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden deck, multiple windows, and the back side of the house with clear roof intersections.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the carport, secondary entry, and another person in the yard, with the fence enclosing the property.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, steps, and a prominent main door under a roof overhang
